analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author met the European Parliament President after EUCO to secure Parliament’s support for reforms and investments to build a modern, more sustainable Union. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly celebrating past successes or historical trajectory; focus is forward-looking support, so not promoted. EU2 (EU is united) – implies inter-institutional cooperation (Council outcome, seeking Parliament’s support) but does not claim unity achieved or agreements reached; cautious: cooperation intent, not evidence of unity, so not promoted. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – references reforms and investments to build a modern, more sustainable Union, suggesting practical EU action benefiting Europeans; aligns with portraying EU measures as improving lives. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – mentions building a “more sustainable Union,” hinting at ambition, but no explicit pioneering claims or leadership framing; insufficient. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not addressed. EU6 (better world) – focuses on internal EU reforms, not global contributions. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
